# POST /api/users

**Create new user**

Creates a new user account with specified roles

Operation ID: `create_2`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Request Body

Schema: `CreateUserRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | Yes | maxLength: 80; minLength: 3 |  |
| password | string | Yes | maxLength: 120; minLength: 6 |  |

| username | string | No |  |  |

| updatedBy | string | No |  |  |
